content.text:
[Mon 2026-04-06 11:30 UTC] [Subagent Context] You are running as a subagent (depth 1/1). Results auto-announce to your requester; do not busy-poll for status.

[Subagent Task]: REBUILD Pangkas barbershop app — full overhaul based on Deep Think blueprint.

## Current state
~/pangkas/index.html — 2435 lines, single-file HTML, based on Rome Bois. Dark teal theme. Working but basic.

## What to do
Read the current file at ~/pangkas/index.html first, then OVERWRITE it with a fully overhauled version.

## Key changes from Deep Think blueprint:

### Navigation
- Bottom navigation bar (fixed bottom, 5 items):
  1. 🏠 Home (dashboard)
  2. 💰 Kasir (POS)
  3. 📋 Antrian (queue)
  4. 👥 Member
  5. ☰ Lainnya (more: janji, laporan, hutang, belanja, admin)
- Role-aware: Kasir role lands on Kasir tab, Admin lands on Home
- 56×56px touch targets (wet hands barbershop)
- 16px minimum font

### Design System Upgrade
- Keep dark teal theme (bg: #0a0a0f, primary: #0ABFBC)
- Add CSS custom properties for all design tokens
- Better spacing, shadows, transitions
- Cards with subtle glass effect
- Animated tab transitions
- Toast notifications (success/error/info)
- Better modal styling
- Empty states with illustrations (emoji-based)
- Loading states for all async actions

### Feature Additions/Upgrades

**Home Dashboard:**
- Today's revenue (big number with currency animation)
- Transaction count
- Active queue count
- Member total
- Quick actions: + Transaksi, + Antrian
- Recent 5 transactions
- Upcoming appointments
- Barber on duty / performance summary

**Kasir (POS):**
- Keep current service grid + addon grid
- ADD: "Seperti Biasa" button for returning members (loads last order)
- ADD: Member autocomplete on customer name input
- ADD: Discount chips (None, 10%, 20%, 50%, Custom)
- ADD: Paket/bundle support (combo services)
- Better payment modal with bigger touch targets
- Receipt includes shop name, address, tagline from settings

**Antrian (Queue):**
- Queue number (big, bold, colored by status)
- Estimated wait time (position × queueEstimate setting)
- Status: Menunggu (gold) → Dilayani (teal) → Selesai (gray)
- Sound notification option (when next customer)
- Auto-reset daily
- Barber assignment
- "Pindah ke Kasir" button when done (pre-fills transaction)

**Janji Temu:**
- Calendar view (month grid)
- Add appointment with phone number
- WA Reminder button (generates wa.me link with shop name)
- Status badges
- Delete appointment

**Member:**
- Search bar
- Visit dots (loyalty progress)
- Birthday section (today + upcoming 7 days + WA greeting)
- Member transaction history
- Customer notes/preferences field
- Total spent display

**Laporan:**
- Period tabs: Hari Ini / Minggu / Bulan / Semua
- Stat cards with colors
- Barber commission breakdown
- Bar chart for daily revenue (pure CSS bars, last 7 days)
- Barber performance table (transactions, revenue, avg rating)
- CSV export + JSON backup/import
- Hutang warning if unpaid exists

**Hutang:**
- Unpaid list with total amount
- Mark paid button (updates commission)
- Payment history

**Belanja:**
- Add expense with category
- Link to addon stock
- Monthly summary
- Category breakdown

**Admin / Settings:**
- Info Toko (nama, alamat, HP, tagline) — saved, shown in receipts
- Staff & PIN management
- Service & pricing management
- Addon management with stock ±
- Settings: commission %, member target, reward, queue estimate, session timeout
- Backup/restore
- Tentang Pangkas

### Data Layer
- Keep localStorage for now (prefix: rb_)
- ADD: Auto-backup every 50 transactions (save full snapshot)
- ADD: Soft delete (30-day flag, not actual deletion)
- UUID for all new IDs: crypto.randomUUID() || 'id-'+Date.now()
- Price denormalization: store actual price at transaction time

### Code Quality
- Clean, well-commented JavaScript
- Consistent naming conventions
- All event handlers work
- All modals close properly
- Every button has a function
- No console errors

## CRITICAL RULES:
1. Single index.html file — ALL CSS in <style>, ALL JS in <script>
2. Keep the SAME visual style as current (dark teal, cards, badges, tables)
3. Every feature MUST be fully functional — no stubs, no TODOs
4. Indonesian language for ALL UI text
5. Mobile-first, 56px minimum touch targets for primary actions
6. Bottom nav fixed at bottom, 64px height, safe-area padding
7. Test every function mentally — if onclick="doX()" then doX() MUST exist
8. rp() for currency, proper date formatting
9. Modal system with overlay
10. Write the COMPLETE file, even if it's 3000+ lines

content.text:
Daftar Layanan & Harga
${svcs.map(s=>` `).join('')}
LayananHargaStatus
${s.name} ${rp(s.price)} ${s.active?'Aktif':'Nonaktif'}
Add-ons & Produk Retail
${(DB.get('addons')||[]).map(a=>` `).join('')}
ProdukHargaStokStatus
${a.name} ${rp(a.price)}
${a.stock??'∞'}
${a.active?'Aktif':'Nonaktif'}
Pengaturan Umum
ℹ️ Tentang
💈 Pangkas v1.0
Aplikasi manajemen barbershop
Made with 💈 by Sentra Technology
`; } function openAddUser(){ openModal(`

👤 Tambah Barber

`); } function saveUser(){ const name=document.getElementById('u-name')?.value?.trim(); const pin=String(document.getElementById('u-pin')?.value||'').trim(); const role=document.getElementById('u-role')?.value; if(!name||pin.length!==4){alert('Nama dan PIN 4 digit wajib diisi');return;} const users=DB.get('users')||[]; if(users.some(u=>u.pin===pin)){alert('PIN sudah digunakan, pilih PIN lain');return;} users.push({id:'u-'+Date.now(),name,pin,role}); DB.set('users',users); closeModal(); renderAdmin(document.getElementById('panel-admin')); } function openEditPin(id){ openModal(`

🔑 Ubah PIN

`); } function savePin(id){ const pin=String(document.getElementById('np-pin')?.value||'').trim(); if(pin.length!==4){alert('PIN harus 4 digit');return;} const users=DB.get('users')||[]; if(users.some(u=>u.pin===pin&&u.id!==id)){alert('PIN sudah digunakan');return;} const u=users.find(x=>x.id===id); if(u) u.pin=pin; DB.set('users',users); closeModal(); renderAdmin(document.getElementById('panel-admin')); } function deleteUser(id){ if(!confirm('Hapus barber ini?')) return; DB.set('users',(DB.get('users')||[]).filter(u=>u.id!==id)); renderAdmin(document.getElementById('panel-admin')); } function openAddService(){ openModal(`

✂️ Tambah Layanan

`); } function openEditService(id){ const svcs=DB.get('services')||[]; const s=svcs.find(x=>x.id===id); if(!s) return; openModal(`

✂️ Edit Layanan

`); } function saveService(id){ const name=document.getElementById('sv-name')?.value?.trim(); const price=parseInt(document.getElementById('sv-price')?.value)||0; const active=document.getElementById('sv-active')?.value!=='false'; if(!name||!price){alert('Nama dan harga wajib diisi');return;} const svcs=DB.get('services')||[]; if(id){ const s=svcs.find(x=>x.id===id); if(s){s.name=name;s.price=price;s.active=active;} } else { svcs.push({id:'s-'+Date.now(),name,price,active:true}); } DB.set('services',svcs); closeModal(); renderAdmin(document.getElementById('panel-admin')); } function deleteService(id){ if(!confirm('Hapus layanan ini?')) return; DB.set('services',(DB.get('services')||[]).filter(s=>s.id!==id)); closeModal(); renderAdmin(document.getElementById('panel-admin')); } function saveShopInfo(){ const s=DB.get('settings')||{}; s.shopName=document.getElementById('set-shopname')?.value?.trim()||''; s.shopAddress=document.getElementById('set-shopaddr')?.value?.trim()||''; s.shopPhone=document.getElementById('set-shopphone')?.value?.trim()||''; s.shopTagline=document.getElementById('set-shoptagline')?.value?.trim()||''; DB.set('settings',s); updateLoginBrand(); alert('Info toko disimpan!'); } function saveSettings(){ const s=DB.get('settings')||{}; s.commission=parseInt(document.getElementById('set-comm')?.value)||40; s.memberVisits=parseInt(document.getElementById('set-mvisit')?.value)||10; s.memberReward=document.getElementById('set-mreward')?.value||'1x Potong Gratis'; s.queueEstimate=parseInt(document.getElementById('set-qest')?.value)||20; DB.set('settings',s); alert('Pengaturan disimpan!'); } // ══════════════════════════════════════════════ // HUTANG TRACKER // ══════════════════════════════════════════════ function renderHutang(el){ const debts=DB.get('debts')||[]; const unpaid=debts.filter(d=>!d.paid); const paid=debts.filter(d=>d.paid); const totalUnpaid=unpaid.reduce((a,d)=>a+d.amount,0); el.innerHTML=`
${unpaid.length}
Hutang Belum Lunas
${rp(totalUnpaid)}
Total Piutang
⚠️ Belum Lunas (${unpaid.length})
${unpaid.length===0?'
✅

Tidak ada hutang!

':''} ${[...unpaid].sort((a,b)=>new Date(a.date)-new Date(b.date)).map(d=>`
👤 ${d.customer}
${rp(d.amount)}
✂️ ${d.barber} · ${new Date(d.date).toLocaleDateString('id-ID',{day:'numeric',month:'short',year:'numeric'})}
${d.note?`
📝 ${d.note}
`:''}
${currentUser.role==='admin'?'':''}
`).join('')}
${paid.length>0?`
✅ Sudah Lunas (${paid.length})
${[...paid].reverse().slice(0,20).map(d=>`
👤 ${d.customer}
${rp(d.amount)}
Lunas: ${new Date(d.paidAt).toLocaleDateString('id-ID',{day:'numeric',month:'short'})}
${currentUser.role==='admin'?'':''}
`).join('')}
`:''}`; } function markDebtPaid(id){ if(!confirm('Tandai hutang ini sebagai LUNAS?')) return; const debts=DB.get('debts')||[]; const d=debts.find(x=>x.id===id); if(d){ d.paid=true; d.paidAt=new Date().toISOString(); } // Update transaction commission now that it's paid if(d){ const txs=DB.get('transactions')||[]; const tx=txs.find(t=>t.id===d.txId); if(tx){ const settings=DB.get('settings')||{commission:40}; tx.commission=Math.round(tx.total*settings.commission/100); tx.isHutang=false; DB.set('transactions',txs); } } DB.set('debts',debts); renderHutang(document.getElementById('panel-hutang')); } function deleteDebt(id){ if(!confirm('Hapus catatan hutang ini?')) return; DB.set('debts',(DB.get('debts')||[]).filter(d=>d.id!==id)); renderHutang(document.getElementById('panel-hutang')); } // ══════════════════════════════════════════════ // BELANJA / PENGELUARAN // ══════════════════════════════════════════════ function renderBelanja(el){ const expenses=DB.get('expenses')||[]; const cats=DB.get('expense_categories')||[]; const now=new Date(); // Filter this month by default const thisMonth=expenses.filter(e=>{ const d=new Date(e.date); return d.getMonth()===now.getMonth()&&d.getFullYear()===now.getFullYear(); }); const totalMonth=thisMonth.reduce((a,e)=>a+e.amount,0); const totalAll=expenses.reduce((a,e)=>a+e.amount,0); // Group by category const byCat={}; thisMonth.forEach(e=>{ byCat[e.category]=(byCat[e.category]||0)+e.amount; }); el.innerHTML=`
${rp(totalMonth)}
Pengeluaran Bulan Ini
${rp(totalAll)}
Total Semua Pengeluaran
Per Kategori (Bulan Ini)
${Object.keys(byCat).length===0?'
Belum ada pengeluaran bulan ini
': Object.entries(byCat).sort((a,b)=>b[1]-a[1]).map(([cat,amt])=>`
📦 ${cat} ${rp(amt)}
`).join('')}
Riwayat Belanja
${expenses.length===0?'
🛒

Belum ada catatan pengeluaran

':''} ${renderExpenseRows(expenses)}
TanggalNamaKategoriJumlah
`; } function renderExpenseRows(expenses){ if(expenses.length===0) return ''; return [...expenses].sort((a,b)=>new Date(b.date)-new Date(a.date)).slice(0,100).map(function(e){ const addons=DB.get('addons')||[]; const linkedAddon=e.addonId?addons.find(a=>a.id===e.addonId):null; const qtyLabel=e.qty&&e.qty>1?' ('+e.qty+' pcs @ '+rp(e.unitPrice||0)+')':''; const profitHtml=linkedAddon&&e.unitPrice? ' jual '+rp(linkedAddon.price)+' → profit '+rp(linkedAddon.price-(e.unitPrice||0))+'/pcs':''; const addonBadge=linkedAddon?'
🧴 '+linkedAddon.name+'':''; return ''+ ''+new Date(e.date).toLocaleDateString('id-ID',{day:'numeric',month:'short'})+''+ ''+e.name+qtyLabel+(e.note?'
'+e.note+'':'')+addonBadge+profitHtml+''+ ''+e.category+''+ ''+rp(e.amount)+''+ ''+ ''+ ''+ ''+ ''; }).join(''); } function openAddBelanja(){ const cats=DB.get('expense_categories')||[]; const addons=DB.get('addons')||[]; const today=new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0]; const box=document.getElementById('modalBox'); box.innerHTML=''; const h3=document.createElement('h3'); h3.textContent='🛒 Catat Pengeluaran'; box.appendChild(h3); // Nama const f1=document.createElement('div'); f1.className='field'; f1.innerHTML=''; box.appendChild(f1); // Kategori const f2=document.createElement('div'); f2.className='field'; const catOpts=cats.map(c=>'').join('')+''; f2.innerHTML=''; box.appendChild(f2); // New cat field (hidden) const f2b=document.createElement('div'); f2b.className='field'; f2b.id='newCatField'; f2b.style.display='none'; f2b.innerHTML=''; box.appendChild(f2b); // Quantity + Unit price row const fqrow=document.createElement('div'); fqrow.style.cssText='display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:.5rem'; fqrow.innerHTML= '
'+ '
'; box.appendChild(fqrow); // Total amount (auto-calc, readonly) const ftotal=document.createElement('div'); ftotal.className='field'; ftotal.innerHTML=''+ ''; box.appendChild(ftotal); // Auto-calc total setTimeout(()=>{ const qtyEl=document.getElementById('ex-qty'); const priceEl=document.getElementById('ex-unitprice'); const totalEl=document.getElementById('ex-amount'); function calcTotal(){ const q=parseInt(qtyEl.value)||1; const p=parseInt(priceEl.value)||0; totalEl.value=q*p||''; } [336 more lines in file. Use offset=2101 to continue.]

content.thinking:
Now I have a thorough understanding of the current app. It's a single-file barbershop management app with:
- Login via PIN
- Onboarding flow
- Top nav with tabs
- Home dashboard, Kasir (POS), Antrian (queue), Janji (appointments), Member, Birthday, Laporan (reports), Hutang (debts), Belanja (expenses), Admin sections

The blueprint asks me to overhaul this into a version with:
1. **Bottom navigation bar** (5 items: Home, Kasir, Antrian, Member, Lainnya)
2. **Design system upgrade** with CSS custom properties, glass effects, animations, toasts


3. **Enhanced features** across all sections like "Seperti Biasa", member autocomplete, discount chips, barber assignment in queue, and calendar view for appointments
4. **New data layer** with auto-backup, soft delete, UUID generation, and price denormalization

This is a massive rewrite. I'm planning the structure with a bottom nav containing 5 tabs where "Lainnya" opens a sub-menu for Janji, Laporan, Hutang, Belanja, and Admin, then I'll write the complete file with role-based access control.

Writing the complete file... I'm going back and forth on whether to write this as one massive file or break it into chunks—ultimately a single write call makes more sense for a complete HTML file. Let me map out the critical components: the design system with CSS variables and glass-morphism cards, the bottom navigation with five main sections, and then layer in the transaction logic, data persistence, and the sliding panel UI for the "Lainnya" submenu. Writing the complete HTML file... Building out the HTML structure... Writing the main application logic... Writing the complete file...

I'm mapping out the key features: a bottom sheet for additional options that slides up with sub-menu items, a "Seperti Biasa" button in the cashier that loads returning members' previous orders, member autocomplete with a dropdown filter, discount chips for preset percentages and custom amounts, a revenue chart using CSS bars for the last week, an improved calendar grid, and queue wait time calculations based on position and estimates.

Now I'm thinking through the navigation structure—the bottom nav has five items, and when "Lainnya" is tapped, it opens a bottom sheet with options that close once selected while keeping "Lainnya" highlighted. I'll create all panels upfront rather than dynamically, starting with the home panel and building out from there.

Writing the complete file structure... Writing the complete application code... Now I'm mapping out the remaining features: autocomplete will populate the customer name and trigger the "Seperti Biasa" check, discount options will range from preset percentages to custom amounts in either currency, the bar chart will use pure CSS to visualize the last week's transactions, and the queue system will support optional barber assignment with a transition button to move completed items to the kasir with their details pre-filled. I'm also adding member search filtering, a notes field for preferences, transaction history viewing, and a birthday section to track special dates.

Now I need to write the complete file with all these features integrated. Given the size, I'll compose it as one comprehensive string and use the write tool to create it all at once. I'm settling on a structured approach: CSS with custom properties organized by component, minimal HTML, and JavaScript split into clear feature sections. Given the massive scope of this file, I'll write it all at once using the write tool to ensure everything stays cohesive and functional.

Writing the complete file now... I'm going to write this file in chunks using exec commands to avoid any truncation issues—CSS and HTML first, then JavaScript in three parts, and finally move everything to the target location. Let me start executing these commands now, being careful with escaping for template literals, quotes in handlers, and special characters.

content.text: Now I have a thorough understanding of the current app. Let me build the complete overhauled version. This is a massive rewrite with bottom nav, enhanced features, and all the blueprint requirements.

content.thinking:
Now I need to build a complete overhaul of the Pangkas barbershop app. Let me plan the structure:

1. **Bottom navigation** with 5 tabs: Home, Kasir, Antrian, Member, Lainnya (which opens a submenu for janji, laporan, hutang, belanja, admin)
2. **Design system upgrade** with CSS custom properties, glass effects, toast notifications, animations
3. **All features fully functional** - no stubs

Let me write the complete file. This will be very long but all functional.

Key changes:
- Bottom nav (fixed) instead of top tabs


- Role-aware landing pages so kasir users see the Kasir tab first while admins land on Home
- Touch targets sized at 56px for mobile usability
- Toast notifications for user feedback
- Improved modal dialogs
- Complete implementation of all features from the blueprint

I'll structure this with CSS defining the design tokens and layout system, then build out the HTML with the login screen, onboarding flow, and app shell containing the topbar, content panels, and bottom navigation. The JavaScript layer will handle the database interactions, state management, authentication, and tab navigation.

Building the complete app... I'm settling on a better UX pattern where tapping "Lainnya" shows a grid of options—Janji Temu, Laporan, Hutang, Belanja, and Admin—and selecting one switches to that sub-panel while keeping "Lainnya" highlighted in the bottom nav.

Now I'm thinking through several features to add: a "Seperti Biasa" button that auto-loads a member's previous transaction items when they're recognized, member autocomplete as the user types in the customer field, discount chips for quick selection, and a Paket section in admin for creating service bundles. I should also include queue barber assignment, a "Pindah ke Kasir" button to move completed queue items to checkout, an improved receipt with shop details, member search, transaction history, notes fields, and total spending displays.

For the dashboard, I'm adding a bar chart showing daily revenue and a performance table for barbers. Given how large this is getting, I need to write it as a complete, functional file rather than piecemeal. Let me structure the data models first with settings like commission rates and member rewards, user roles, and other core configurations.

Writing the complete file structure... I'm finishing out the data schema with appointments, debts, expenses, and bundle structures, then setting up utility functions for generating unique IDs and implementing an auto-backup system that tracks transaction counts.

Now I'm thinking through how to structure this massive file—it's going to exceed 4000 lines, so I should break it into logical sections rather than writing it all at once. Writing the HTML structure... Building the HTML structure...

I'm thinking through how to handle the "Lainnya" tab—whether to use a bottom sheet overlay or treat it as another panel like the rest. The cleanest approach would be to make all sections consistent panels, so "Lainnya" becomes a menu panel with grid items that navigate to sub-panels, each with a back button to return to the main menu.

Now I'm planning out the complete JavaScript architecture, mapping all the functions I'll need to reference in the onclick handlers to make sure everything connects properly. Utility and auth functions are set up, now I'm mapping out the navigation layer with tab switching and panel rendering, plus the home view structure that's starting to come together.

For the POS system, I'm building out the Kasir module with service, addon, and bundle grids, a shopping cart with add/remove functionality, checkout flow with payment method selection, discount handling, member lookup with autocomplete, and receipt printing.

Then there's the queue management system with functions to add, serve, complete, and cancel queue items, plus the ability to move a queued customer directly to the POS with their info pre-filled.

For appointments, I'm setting up a calendar view with navigation controls and a list view that filters appointments by selected date.

The member section handles the full lifecycle—adding, editing, and deleting members, tracking their visits both manually and automatically through transactions, searching/filtering the member list, and viewing detailed member history.

Finally, there's the reports section to render various business reports. The Admin section handles shop configuration, user management, and service/addon inventory through various CRUD operations—managing shop info, settings, user accounts with PIN authentication, and complete control over services and add-ons, plus stock adjustment capabilities.

Now I'm seeing the remaining functions for bundle management and data backup/restore, then a separate menu rendering function. I've got a comprehensive list of all the operations needed, so I'm ready to write out the complete implementation, keeping the file organized and efficient despite its length.

For the "Lainnya" section, I'll use a state variable to track which sub-panel is active, so when users tap menu items it switches between the grid view and specific sub-panels. The main panel structure will have a dedicated lainnya container that conditionally renders either the menu or the active sub-panel based on that state.

Writing the complete file now... Writing the complete application file... Adding toast notifications for user feedback, then I'll write out the complete file—aiming for around 4000-5000 lines with careful attention to making sure every function call has a corresponding implementation. For the "Lainnya" panel, I'm thinking of a grid-based menu system where clicking an option calls showSubPanel() to display that content with a back button. One thing I want to refine: the "Pindah ke Kasir" button should pre-fill the cashier with the customer name and service details from the selected queue item, then switch tabs. Alright, let me start writing this now.

Writing the complete file...

content.text:
Now I have a complete understanding of the current app. Let me build the full overhaul. This is going to be a massive rewrite — bottom nav, all features functional, design system upgrade.

I'll write it in chunks due to the size.
